name: Marcy Perez Loan Officer- Home Lending
description_short: Marcy Perez is a mortgage loan officer at First Community Mortgage TX (NMLS #311868) in Killeen, Texas, specializing in home lending and the mortgage application process.
description_long:
First Community Mortgage TX is a Texas-based mortgage lender operating out of Killeen with Marcy Perez as a licensed loan officer (NMLS #311868). The company facilitates residential mortgage lending and supports borrowers through the home financing journey with digital tools and personalized guidance.

The company offers a digital mortgage platform where borrowers can apply for loans, upload required documentation (driver's license, bank statements, tax returns, W2 forms), and communicate directly with their loan officer. They provide a mobile app that enables secure document scanning, payment calculations, and real-time loan status updates. The platform is designed to streamline the mortgage application process with online account management and instant messaging with the loan officer.

First Community Mortgage TX distinguishes itself through a mobile-first approach to home lending, allowing borrowers to handle most of the application and documentation process via smartphone. The company appears to focus on convenience and accessibility, particularly for Texas borrowers, with features like mobile app notifications and direct communication channels with their loan officer team.

As a single loan officer profile on the platform, the company's full range of mortgage products (purchase vs. refinance, loan types, rates) is not detailed on this particular page. Texas borrowers have complaint and consumer protection resources through the Texas Department of Savings and Mortgage Lending, and the company maintains compliance with state regulatory requirements for mortgage banker operations.

The main caveat is that specific loan products, rates, terms, and company background are not detailed on this platform page, requiring direct contact to compare offers and understand full lending options.
